summary: Filter a real Image/Field1 plane by a radial frequency band: forward DFT, multiply by an ideal or gaussian band response over [low, high] cycles-per-pixel (band-pass or band-stop), inverse DFT. Periodic (wrap) boundary.

inputs.name: input
inputs.doc: The real Image or Field1 plane to filter.

outputs.name: output
outputs.doc: The band-filtered plane, same kind and extent as the input.

params.name: low
params.doc: The lower band cutoff in cycles-per-pixel (DC 0, per-axis Nyquist 0.5).

params.name: high
params.doc: The upper band cutoff in cycles-per-pixel (>= low).

params.name: window
params.doc: The band response shape: an ideal brick-wall or a soft gaussian roll-off.

params.name: mode
params.doc: Keep the band (band-pass) or reject it (band-stop, the complement).

perceptual.reason: the band-pass filter is verified by the declared-band attenuation, DC preservation, and full-band identity fixtures, not a perceptual metric
